name: Broccoli Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onions in butter until translucent.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the skillet and stir until combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a greased two-quart casserole dish.
4. Bake uncovered for 40 - 45 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
